faqs.question: How do I know if I have a clothes moth infestation in my Gerritsen Beach home?
faqs.answer: Common signs include small holes in wool clothing, carpets, or upholstery, silken tubes or cases on fabrics, adult moths flying near closets or windows (especially at dusk), and larvae or webbing in stored clothing. You may also notice damage to natural fiber items like cashmere, silk, or fur stored in closets or attic spaces.

faqs.question: What does clothes moth control cost in Gerritsen Beach?
faqs.answer: Clothes moth control services in Gerritsen Beach typically range from $550 to $5,000 depending on the severity of the infestation, the size of your home, and the number of affected areas. We provide free inspections and detailed quotes before beginning any treatment, ensuring transparent pricing with no hidden fees.

faqs.question: How long does clothes moth treatment take to work?
faqs.answer: Most treatments show immediate results in reducing adult moth populations, but complete elimination typically takes 2-4 weeks as we target all life stages including eggs and larvae. We often recommend follow-up treatments to ensure long-term protection, especially in Gerritsen Beach homes where coastal humidity can contribute to recurring issues.

faqs.question: Can clothes moths damage more than just clothing?
faqs.answer: Yes, clothes moths feed on any natural fibers including wool carpets, upholstered furniture, curtains, blankets, and even pet hair accumulated in corners. They're particularly destructive to stored items like winter coats, vintage clothing, and heirloom textiles. Our comprehensive treatment protects all vulnerable materials throughout your Gerritsen Beach home.
